title: Cosmos SDK tendermint.types.BlockIDFlag Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions for the tendermint.types.BlockIDFlag module of the Cosmos SDK gRPC-gateway REST API.

tendermint.types.BlockIDFlag.description:
- BLOCK_ID_FLAG_UNKNOWN: indicates an error condition
 - BLOCK_ID_FLAG_ABSENT: the vote was not received
 - BLOCK_ID_FLAG_COMMIT: voted for the block that received the majority
 - BLOCK_ID_FLAG_NIL: voted for nil
tendermint.types.BlockIDFlag.title: BlockIdFlag indicates which BlockID the signature is for
